overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a dark forest at night. The character travels along a winding dirt path surrounded by dense coniferous trees under a clear night sky with a cool blue-green atmospheric color grade.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path with swords strapped to his back, moving through relatively open woodland

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the forest floor
tall pine trees lining the left side of the path
tall pine trees lining the right side of the path
dark blue night sky visible through the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a dirt forest path at night. The trees are moderately spaced with the night sky partially visible overhead. The path is clear and surrounded by grass verges as the character moves forward through the woodland entrance.

events.description: forest becomes significantly denser with trees closing in on both sides of the path, blocking the sky

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding trail as the forest closes in, creating a more enclosed and immersive atmosphere

entered.detail: thick bushes and low vegetation growing alongside the path

segments.scene_description: As Geralt progresses deeper, the forest transitions to a narrow enclosed space with dense vegetation pressing close to the path. The sky becomes mostly obscured by the thick canopy, and the trees move from the far background to frame the path closely on both sides.

events.description: path curves gently to the right as the character navigates deeper into the forest

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the dark forest interior, following the curving dirt trail surrounded by tall pines on all sides

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the path curves gently to the right as Geralt continues through the deep forest. The environment remains densely wooded with no sky visible, creating an immersive nighttime woodland atmosphere. The trail winds through the thick coniferous forest with consistent dense vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt travels from an open woodland entrance into the claustrophobic depths of a dense coniferous forest at night. It begins with the character walking along a clear dirt path where the night sky is still partially visible through moderately spaced trees. As he progresses deeper, the environment shifts into a narrow enclosed space where thick vegetation presses close to the trail and the canopy obscures the sky. The scene then tightens further as the path curves gently to the right, winding through an immersive, heavily wooded landscape with no remaining glimpse of the horizon.
